title: AvailabilityError
description: Error object describing the reason of failure

code.description:
Error Codes:
  * `404` - Not found
  * `405` - ClassUnitCode doesn't exist
  * `602` - itemNos in query is required
  * `604` - itemNos.`n` in query should be at least 8 chars long. Where `n` is the positional indicator for the parameter.
  * `606` - expand.`n` in query should be one of [ChildItems Restocks StoresList SalesLocations DeliveryPrice CollectPrice DisplayLocations DeliveryTime FoodAvailabilities]. Where `n` is the positional indicator for the parameter.

details.description: Additional error details. These change depending on the context of the query.
